mapper.select: SELECT * from mlsd_home_page LEFT JOIN mlsd_brand_culture ON mlsd_brand_culture.id=mlsd_home_page.id LEFT JOIN mlsd_company_profile ON mlsd_company_profile.id=mlsd_home_page.id LEFT JOIN mlsd_contact_us ON mlsd_contact_us.id=mlsd_home_page.id LEFT JOIN mlsd_item_advantage ON mlsd_item_advantage.id=mlsd_home_page.id LEFT JOIN mlsd_join_investment ON mlsd_join_investment.id=mlsd_home_page.id LEFT JOIN mlsd_online_service ON mlsd_online_service.id=mlsd_home_page.id LEFT JOIN mlsd_product_presentation ON mlsd_product_presentation.id=mlsd_home_page.id LEFT JOIN mlsd_store_display ON mlsd_store_display.id=mlsd_home_page.id LEFT JOIN mlsd_strength ON mlsd_strength.id=mlsd_home_page.id where mlsd_home_page.id=#{mlsdId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
